productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Neptune White Sports Shoes
description: These running shoes from adidas double up as great casual wear when teamed with your favourite denims and tees. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish.UpperSynthetic leather uppers with synthetic overlays for snug Fit and protectionadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performancePerforations on the heel cup and toe-guardMesh padded tongue provides better breathable comfortPadded mesh collar offers better fitLace-up system for a snug, customised fitBrand name printed on the tongue and below the collarMidsoleShock-absorbing midsole for added comfortOutsoleTPU non-marking rubber outsole with triangular lugs for superior gripScooped heel for added tractionAbrasion resistant foxing & toe-guard for additional protection and durabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
